visual_elements.text: 01 Recognize Your Skills You already possess the innovator's toolkit through clinical training
02 Reframe Your Mindset See yourself as an innovator solving problems daily
03 Apply to New Challenges Use your diagnostic approach to tackle healthcare system issues
04 Lead Change Transform your practice and inspire colleagues through innovation
